title: Comparison UI — radar charts + side-by-side stats
description: Build comparison view with: player selector (search + autocomplete), radar chart overlay (6 dimensions: SR, Avg, Boundary%, Dot%, Phase Balance, Consistency), side-by-side stat table, phase heatmap comparison. Use Chart.js or D3 for radar.
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: Comparison UI blocked by TKT-216 (data pipeline, Stephen Curry). KDB bottleneck — cannot start until upstream dependency ships. Deferred to Sprint 6.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred to Sprint 6. Blocked by TKT-216 (head-to-head data pipeline). Once TKT-216 ships, KDB can build comparison UI. Sprint 6 P0 for EPIC-020.
